name: Ping Pong
current_goal: Maintain the single-node intranet speed-test service at app version 0.3.0 with browser-scoped Recent Results, fixed homepage Quick 20s and Full 30s modes, proportional startup trimming, Raw CV and Stable CV throughput diagnostics, IQR kept/outlier-rate card diagnostics, current-run Raw Data popup/CSV diagnostics, a topbar English speed-test guide dialog, stability-first completion summaries, hotspot data-plan warning, required per-test Wired/Wi-Fi labeling, current connection IP visibility, Web Worker execution, HTML/PNG/Markdown IT diagnostic report export, local-throttled maintenance self-tests, a desktop one-screen dashboard, Admin Console controls, local production health, OctoPulse visibility, and repo-visible reusable documentation.
latest_summary: Bumped the uncommitted app version from 0.2.0 to 0.3.0 in package metadata and README. The live rebuilt homepage now shows `v0.3.0` between `Speed Guide` and the hidden admin version pill behavior, with no visible `v0.2.0` remaining.
next_action: Review and commit the version bump plus guide modal changes when ready, then decide whether to include, discard, or separately commit the unrelated dirty files before pushing main to origin/main.

last_commands: git diff --check -- package.json package-lock.json README.md src/client/App.tsx src/client/styles.css .ai/status.json
Browser rendered v0.3.0 verification at 1089x964, 1280x900, 1710x1021, and 390x844
verification.notes: Version bump verification is partial only because Browser screenshot capture is unavailable in this session, so rendered verification used DOM and interaction proof. Typecheck, whitespace diff check, full Vitest suite (97 tests), and production build passed with package version 0.3.0. The PORT=8200 launchd service was restarted after the final build; port 8200 was listening, /api/health returned ok, and the built homepage HTML loaded. Browser DOM QA confirmed the topbar order is `0/4 testing now | Speed Guide | v0.3.0`, no visible `v0.2.0` remains, there is only one `button.version-pill`, there is no horizontal overflow at 1089x964, 1280x900, 1710x1021, and 390x844, the hidden admin five-click entry still opens `/admin`, and console warnings/errors are empty.

attention: .ai/status.json was refreshed after the uncommitted version bump and guide modal implementation and is intentionally uncommitted as the current delivery-state snapshot.

Working tree now includes uncommitted version bump changes in package.json, package-lock.json, and README.md, uncommitted English guide modal changes in README.md, src/client/App.tsx, and src/client/styles.css, plus unrelated pre-existing .gitignore and AGENTS.md edits, a deleted Ping-Pong project docx, untracked Ping-Pong-Project-Specification.html, and docs/analysis-data-debugging.md.
Branch main is ahead of origin/main by 3 commits, including 9732da7.
Browser behavior QA passed, but screenshot evidence could not be captured because Browser tab.screenshot timed out on CDP Page.captureScreenshot.
The running service uses .env PORT=8200, not the README default 8080.
Local throttled runs are maintenance checks only; a non-local intranet device test is still required to evaluate real network performance.
